prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-KARAOKE-KEYBOARD-PARENT Product Type: MUSICAL_INSTRUMENT_TOY Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Kids Keyboard Piano with Microphone Lights Music Sounds (2 Colors) Description: Featuring lights, piano sounds and music, this portable and battery-operated kids keyboard piano from Kidplokio is a fun activity for little music lovers. With it's easy to use buttons, piano keyboard and singing microphone, this keyboard piano kids toy play set will have your musical marvel singing, dancing and engaging with music.

Kidplokio's playtime keyboard piano and microphone set is the perfect music toy to let your kid's inner rock star shine. They can sing along to pre-recorded music or carry their own tune while playing the piano keyboard. And, to make things even more fun, the flashing lights help your little one imagine or pretend play that they are performing on stage to a live audience (and the stuffies go wild.)

And in addition to all the musical fun, this music toy is the perfect creative outlet for young minds; Combined with an improved development of hand eye coordination and enhanced musical awareness, the piano keyboard will not only provide hours of fun, but is an educational learning tool too.

Lastly, if your little one is looking to host an outdoor concert with friends, a traveling gig in the car or looking for a fun sleepover playtime toy, the lightweight portability and convenient built in handle makes the Kidplokio keyboard piano toy the perfect music toy to let little toddlers and kids' inner balladeer shine while on the go or away from home.

The Kidplokio kids keyboard piano only requires batteries to get going, no assembly or fussing required. The singing microphone quickly and easily plugs into the keyboard so little ones can start singing right away; the keyboard also features small flip stands on the backside for playing stability. The electronic battery operated piano toy from Kidplokio is suitable for toddlers and young children, both girls and boys alike Search Terms: light up keyboard kids play for playing toy instrument keys toddler toys for girls christmas gift stocking stuffer hanukkah gifts instrument musical learning and educational toys dancing singing microphone creative travel fine motor skills toys for Features: - KIDS KEYBOARD PIANO TOY: Featuring lights, piano sounds and music, this portable and battery operated kids keyboard piano is a fun activity for little music lovers! With it's easy to use buttons, keyboard and microphone, this toy piano set will have your musical marvel having fun singing, dancing and engaging with music - EDUCATIONAL LEARNING TOYS: This handheld keyboard piano and microphone is a perfect creative outlet for young minds; Combined with an improved development of hand eye coordination and enhanced musical awareness, the piano keyboard will not only provide hours of fun, but is an educational learning tool too! - GREAT FOR TRAVEL: If your little one is looking to host an outdoor concert with friends, a traveling gig in the car or a fun sleepover playtime toy, the lightweight portability and convenient built in handle makes the Kidplokio keyboard piano toy the perfect music toy to let toddlers and kids inner rock star shine while on the go or away from home - EASY TO USE KIDS MUSIC TOY: This kids keyboard piano only requires batteries to get going, no assembly or fussing required; the singing microphone quickly and easily plugs into the keyboard so little ones can start singing right away; the keyboard also features small flip stands on the backside for playing stability - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 10.5 x 8.5 x 2.5 inches; Colors: Blue or Pink; Weight: 0.6 ounces; 3 x 1.5V "AA" batteries not included; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
